what_we_saw: billing amounts far above catalog-expected totals
recommended_action: Reconcile flagged order totals against contract pricing before month-end close.

what_we_saw: shipments delivered 4+ days past the scheduled window
recommended_action: Review carrier and route performance for the flagged orders; escalate repeat lanes.
De-duplicate before revenue reporting; add a uniqueness constraint at the curated layer.

what_we_saw: weekly demand far outside the category's local baseline
recommended_action: Confirm drivers (promo, stockout, market event) and adjust replenishment plans.
Trace to the source extract; block at ingestion once root cause is fixed.

what_we_saw: unusual combinations of amount, quantity, discount and delay
recommended_action: Analyst review; label outcomes to tune the model.
Review planner assumptions for the flagged category-weeks; re-baseline if drift persists.
